basic_details.job_title: JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR)
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) has released the official Research Associate Notification 2026 under Advt. No. CPMU/EMR/62/26-27. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026. Candidates possessing a Ph.D. degree in Chemical Science or an equivalent qualification and aged up to 35 years are eligible to apply. Interested candidates can submit their applications through email on or before 12 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are provided below.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. degree in Chemical Science or equivalent
qualification.details: Ph.D. degree in Chemical Science or equivalent.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JNCASR Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 12-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JNCASR Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Research Associate position at JNCASR is 12th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. degree in Chemical Science or an equivalent qualification to be eligible for the Research Associate position at JNCASR.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate position is 35 years. There are no specific minimum age requirements mentioned.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Associate role will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 58,000/- per month, along with 30% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate position in the Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application for the JNCASR Research Associate position must be submitted via email. Candidates need to send their complete application and required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the JNCASR Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Research Associate recruitment at JNCASR.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Associate position at JNCASR will primarily involve an Online Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The Research Associate position at JNCASR is a contractual role. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the contract.

faq.question: Q10. Where is JNCASR located?
faq.answer: Jawaharlal Nehru Centre for Advanced Scientific Research (JNCASR) is located in Bengaluru, Karnataka, with the pincode 560064.
